name: Habanero Pepper Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the seeds and veins from 2 cups of habaneros.
2. Place the habaneros in a saucepan with 1 cup of cider vinegar and bring to a simmer over low heat.
3. Add salt, allspice, thyme, sage, nutmeg, cinnamon, sugar, and lime juice to the pan.
4. Stir until all ingredients are well combined.
5. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
6. Transfer the sauce to a blender and puree until smooth.
7. Store the sauce in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 months.
Note: This recipe is very spicy, so be cautious when handling the peppers and using the finished product.
